zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray於1248年出生在英國英格蘭肯特坦布利其時，他的父親Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk29歲，母親Maud Beauchamp20歲。他於1270年7月15日之後與Agnes Rohese de Clare在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾瑟斯克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1297年11月21日在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾福泰斯 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray于1248年出生在英国英格兰肯特坦布利其时，他的父亲Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk29岁，母亲Maud Beauchamp20岁。他于1270年7月15日之后与Agnes Rohese de Clare在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾瑟斯克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1297年11月21日在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾福泰斯 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray was born in 1248, in Tunbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk, was 29 and his mother, Maud Beauchamp, was 20. He married Agnes Rohese de Clare after 15 July 1270, in Thirsk, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 21 November 1297, in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 49, and was buried in Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, Englan: Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray est né en 1248, à Tunbridge, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud Beauchamp, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Rohese de Clare après 15 juillet 1270, à Thirsk, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 21 novembre 1297, à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray 1248 in Tunbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk 29 und seine Mutter Maud Beauchamp 20. Er hat nach 15. Juli 1270 in Thirsk, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Rohese de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 21. November 1297 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien und wurde in Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray è nato il nel 1248 nel Tunbridge, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Maud Beauchamp, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Rohese de Clare dopo il 15 luglio 1270, nel Thirsk, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 21 novembre 1297, nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbrayが1248年にイギリスイギリスケントトゥンブリッジで生まれた時，父Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirskは29歳，母Maud Beauchampは20歳であった。1270年7月15日以後にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスイルスクでAgnes Rohese de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1297年11月21日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアフォウンティインス アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 포우테인스 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray(이)가 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 툰브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Beauchamp(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1270년 7월 15일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 Agnes Rohese de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1297년 11월 21일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 포우테인스 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray nasceu em 1248, em Tunbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud Beauchamp, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Rohese de Clare após 15 de julho de 1270, em Thirsk, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 21 de novembro de 1297, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, Englan: фоунтеинс эбби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray родился в 1248 г. в местности тунбридж, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Beauchamp, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Rohese de Clare после 15 июля 1270 г. в местности тирск, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 21 ноября 1297 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности фоунтеинс эбби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray nació en 1248, en Tunbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Maud Beauchamp, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes Rohese de Clare después de 15 de julio de 1270, en Thirsk, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 21 de noviembre de 1297, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Fountains Abbey, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
